CustomField.formula:
IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "Awaiting Response"), "Awaiting Response❓", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "In Progress"), "In Progress 🟡", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "Complete"), "Complete ✅", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "Escalated To Project"), "Escalated To Project 📓", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "On Hold"), "On Hold ⏸️", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "Blocked"), "Blocked 🅱️", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "Cancelled"), "Cancelled ❌", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Backlog"), "Backlog 🔙", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Tasked to CloudJungle"), "Tasked to CloudJungle❗", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "To be Reviewed"),"To be Reviewed 📝", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "In Testing"), "In Testing 🧪", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Awaiting Deployment"), "Awaiting Deployment 🔜", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Ready to Start"), "Ready to Start👍", IF(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Not Started"), "Not Started 🔴",
"Status Not Selected "))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: Ticket Status Visual
